name: Timeline
description: Vertical event timeline for audit logs, activity history, and change tracking.

entries.description: Array of timeline entries with date, title, description, color, and icon

default.description: Custom timeline content (alternative to entries prop)

decision_rule: Use for audit logs, activity history, and change tracking. Each entry should have timestamp and description.

filament_equivalent.note: In Filament infolists, build a custom section for timeline data
